title: Google's Agents CLI: The CLI + Skills Combination to Ship AI Agents EASILY
summary: Google's Agents CLI is an open-source command-line tool that enables rapid development and production deployment of AI agents. It provides sandboxed code execution environments, agent identity management, and audit trails for production-grade AI agent systems.
writeup: Cole Medin's video covers Google's Agents CLI, an open-source command-line tool for building and deploying AI agents, paired with a skills system for shipping them quickly. It matters because the tool targets production-grade requirements rather than prototypes, supplying sandboxed code execution environments, agent identity management, and audit trails. The concrete takeaways: the CLI handles secure execution, supports multi-agent systems and agentic workflows, and provides auditing for tracking agent behavior in production.
